Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
core.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
The core engine of the game responsible for managing game state, turn progression, move validation, and specific combat actions like shooting and stabbing.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameEngine(Board board)
    Initializes a new GameEngine with the specified board.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Board
    getBoard()
    Retrieves the current game board.
    Color
    getCurrentTurn()
    Gets the color of the player whose turn it currently is.

    Retrieves all valid and safe moves for a given piece on the current board.
    int
    getTotalMoves()
    Gets the total number of valid moves or actions made in the game so far.
    Color
    getWinner()
    Gets the winning color, if the game is over.
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Checks if the game has concluded.
    MoveResult
    makeMove(Position from, Position to)
    Attempts to perform a standard move for a piece from one position to another.
    MoveResult
    shoot(Position shooterPos, Position target)
    Executes a ranged shoot action if the piece at the starting position implements Shootable.
    MoveResult
    stab(Position shooterPos, Position target)
    Executes a melee stab action if the piece at the starting position implements Stabbable.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEngine

      public GameEngine(Board board)
      Initializes a new GameEngine with the specified board. The game starts with the WHITE player's turn.
      Parameters:
      board - the game board to be used for this engine instance

  • Method Details

    • makeMove

      public MoveResult makeMove(Position from, Position to)
      Attempts to perform a standard move for a piece from one position to another. * @param from the starting position of the piece to move
      Parameters:
      to - the destination position
      Returns:
      a MoveResult indicating success or the specific reason for failure

    • stab

      public MoveResult stab(Position shooterPos, Position target)
      Executes a melee stab action if the piece at the starting position implements Stabbable. This moves the attacking piece to the target position upon a successful stab.
      Parameters:
      shooterPos - the current position of the attacking piece
      target - the target position to stab
      Returns:
      a MoveResult detailing the outcome of the action

    • shoot

      public MoveResult shoot(Position shooterPos, Position target)
      Executes a ranged shoot action if the piece at the starting position implements Shootable. A shooting attack does not move the attacking piece.
      Parameters:
      shooterPos - the current position of the shooting piece
      target - the targeted position to shoot at
      Returns:
      a MoveResult detailing the outcome of the action

    • getSafeMoves

      public List<Position> getSafeMoves(Piece piece)
      Retrieves all valid and safe moves for a given piece on the current board.
      Parameters:
      piece - the piece to check
      Returns:
      a list of legal destination positions

    • getCurrentTurn

      public Color getCurrentTurn()
      Gets the color of the player whose turn it currently is.
      Returns:
      the current turn's color

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Checks if the game has concluded.
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise

    • getWinner

      public Color getWinner()
      Gets the winning color, if the game is over.
      Returns:
      the winning color, or null if the game is still ongoing

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Retrieves the current game board.
      Returns:
      the board instance

    • getTotalMoves

      public int getTotalMoves()
      Gets the total number of valid moves or actions made in the game so far.
      Returns:
      the total move count
